Name: Tuf Wear Balboa Floor to Ceiling Top to Bottom Ball
DESCRIPTION: Find your rhythm. The Tuf Wear Balboa Floor To Ceiling Ball is your essential tool for developing lightning-fast reflexes and pinpoint accuracy. Designed to keep you constantly moving, this ball mimics the unpredictable movement of an opponent, forcing you to slip, block, and strike with precision. Crafted from heavy-duty synthetic leather in a classic 8-panel design, it offers the durability needed for daily gym use.The ball is perfectly balanced for a consistent rebound, allowing you to build a fluid rhythm. It features a practical laced opening on the side, allowing for easy access to change the bladder if needed, ensuring your equipment lasts longer. It comes complete with top and bottom bungee cords, designed so the top cord is shorter than the bottom, ensuring the ball sits naturally at head height for realistic targeting.Complete Set: Includes adjustable top and bottom bungee cords for immediate setup.Sharpen Reflexes: Perfect for training hand-eye coordination, timing, and head movement.Easy Maintenance: Features side lacing for quick and easy bladder replacement.Head-Height Design: Shorter top cord ensures the ball sits at the correct height for realistic training.Classic Style: Finished in a clean Blue and White colourway with Tuf Wear branding.
